prompt: Range bucket is strong but the action is already large. Choose action.
why_v1: Call keeps a strong bucket in the pot when the action is already large and another raise would add pressure too quickly.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Call fits this strong bucket because the existing pressure already lets the hand continue without forcing more into the pot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call fits this strong bucket because control can be stronger than adding another raise when the pot is already growing.
